classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Manages application runtime and topology operations for the Neural Link MCP Server.
 *
 * This service provides tools for inspecting the runtime structure (workers, windows) and
 * controlling the application lifecycle (reloading).
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.services.neural-link.RuntimeService
 * @extends Neo.core.Base
 * @singleton
 */
classData.summary:
Manages application runtime and topology operations for the Neural Link MCP Server.

This service provides tools for inspecting the runtime structure (workers, windows) and
controlling the application lifecycle (reloading).
classData.name: RuntimeService

classData.comment:
/**
     * Manages the global Neo.config.
     * @param {Object} opts            The options object.
     * @param {String} opts.action     'get' | 'set'
     * @param {Object} [opts.config]   The partial config object (for set action).
     * @param {String} opts.sessionId  The target session ID.
     * @param {String} [opts.windowId] Optional window ID (for get action).
     * @returns {Promise<Object>}
     */
classData.name: manageNeoConfig

classData.comment:
/**
     * Retrieves the navigation history stack.
     * @param {Object} opts            The options object.

     * @returns {Promise<Object>}
     */
classData.name: getRouteHistory

classData.comment:
/**
     * Retrieves the topology of all connected windows.
     * @returns {Promise<Object[]>} List of windows.
     */
classData.description: Retrieves the topology of all connected windows.
classData.name: getWindowTopology

classData.comment:
/**
     * Opens a known live component in a browser popup through the app runtime.
     * @param {Object} opts
     * @param {String} opts.componentId   The component id to pop out.
     * @param {String} [opts.dashboardId] Optional dashboard/container id owning the popup primitive.
     * @param {Object} [opts.rect]        Optional source rectangle used for popup placement.
     * @param {String} [opts.sessionId]   Optional App Worker session scope.
     * @param {String} [opts.windowId]    Optional known source window id from topology.
     * @returns {Promise<Object>}
     */
classData.description: Opens a known live component in a browser popup through the app runtime.

params.description: Optional dashboard/container id owning the popup primitive.
params.name: opts.dashboardId

params.description: Optional source rectangle used for popup placement.
params.name: opts.rect

params.description: Optional known source window id from topology.
params.name: opts.windowId

classData.name: openComponentWindow

classData.comment:
/**
     * Moves a known live browser popup window when the runtime supports native window positioning.
     * @param {Object} opts
     * @param {String} opts.windowId    The logical window id from topology.
     * @param {Number} opts.x           The target screen x coordinate.
     * @param {Number} opts.y           The target screen y coordinate.
     * @param {String} [opts.sessionId] Optional App Worker session scope.
     * @returns {Promise<Object>}
     */
classData.description: Moves a known live browser popup window when the runtime supports native window positioning.
classData.name: positionWindow

classData.comment:
/**
     * Focuses a known live browser popup window when the runtime exposes a focus handle.
     * @param {Object} opts
     * @param {String} opts.windowId    The logical window id from topology.
     * @param {String} [opts.sessionId] Optional App Worker session scope.
     * @returns {Promise<Object>}
     */
classData.description: Focuses a known live browser popup window when the runtime exposes a focus handle.
classData.name: focusWindow

classData.description: Retrieves the topology of all connected App Workers.
classData.name: getWorkerTopology

     */
classData.description: Inspects a Neo.mjs class to retrieve its schema.
classData.name: inspectClass

classData.comment:
/**
     * Replaces a method implementation on a class prototype at runtime.
     * @param {Object} opts            The options object.
     * @param {String} opts.className  The fully qualified class name.
     * @param {String} opts.methodName The name of the method to patch.
     * @param {String} opts.sessionId  The target session ID.
     * @param {String} opts.source     The new function source code.
     * @returns {Promise<Object>}
     */
classData.description: Replaces a method implementation on a class prototype at runtime.

params.description: The name of the method to patch.
params.name: opts.methodName

classData.name: patchCode
reloadPage
